description: Characterize the contrast enhancement pattern of the tumor on the brain MRI by comparing T1 and T1ce sequences. Load the T1 pre-contrast volume from ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/{sample_id}/{sample_id}_t1.nii.gz. Using ROIs in the tumor and normal white matter, determine the enhancement ratio, relative enhancement, enhancement degree, and spatial pattern. Save the ROI markups to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/enhancement_rois.mrk.json and export a report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/enhancement_report.json with the fields: t1_tumor_mean, t1ce_tumor_mean, t1_wm_mean, t1ce_wm_mean, enhancement_ratio, relative_enhancement_percent, classification, pattern, tumor_roi_position, and notes.
